metadata.title: AutoConnect Digital CX Platform
metadata.description: The CX Platform Connecting Every Moment in the Customer Lifecycle. From Sales to Loyalty - without Rip & Replace.

hero.headlineLine2: Every Moment in the Customer Lifecycle.

whatIs.intro1: AutoConnect is the customer experience orchestration layer that unifies sales and aftersales into one seamless, brand-compliant journey, without replacing your existing systems.
whatIs.intro2: It integrates with your DMS, CRM, and other systems to deliver a connected, digital-first experience that drives sales, customer retention, and lifetime customer value.
whatIs.transformSubheading: Today's customers expect every interaction with your brand to be connected and effortless. But most dealers still struggle with:

manual.title: Manual Processes
manual.description: That drain efficiency and customer satisfaction

rigid.title: Rigid Platforms
rigid.description: That can't keep up with customer expectations

features.subheading: Make every customer interaction faster, clearer, and connected.

productShopping.title: PRODUCT SHOPPING ENGINE
productShopping.subtitle: Real-time discovery, configuration, and booking powered by live DMS sync.
bullets: Vehicle Data: Features vehicle data, configurator, and specs comparison.
Real-Time Inventory Sync: Automatic updates from your DMS.
Certified Pre-Owned: Showcase and sell used vehicles online.

financing.title: FAST & FLEXIBLE FINANCING JOURNEY
financing.subtitle: Give customers a seamless buying experience from application to approval.
bullets: Instant offers powered by a configurable financing engine.
Fully digital: Credit applications, document uploads, status tracking.
Connect directly with financing teams for real-time reviews and approvals.

afterSales.title: AFTER-SALES EXPERIENCE
afterSales.subtitle: Deliver convenience and service excellence.
bullets: Effortless Service Booking with real-time availability.
Convenience: Pickup & delivery, service tracking, one-click invoice approvals.
All-in-One Service Hub: Access vehicle history and make digital payments.

workflow.title: WORKFLOW AUTOMATION
workflow.subtitle: Automate processes so your teams can focus on what matters most.
bullets: Digital Workflows for approvals, notifications, and SLAs in one system.
Cross-Department Sync: Keep sales, delivery, and support aligned.
Full Control: Manage workflows, triggers, and escalations via admin panel.

orderManagement.title: UNIFIED ORDER MANAGEMENT
orderManagement.subtitle: Give customers a smooth, flexible path from build to buy.
bullets: Seamless End-to-End Flow: From vehicle configuration to confirmed order.
Multiple Buying Paths: Direct purchase, reservation, or quotation.
Flexible Payments: Cards, split payments, bank transfers, and more.

customerProfile.title: UNIFIED CUSTOMER PROFILE
customerProfile.subtitle: Give your customers one login for their entire ownership experience.
bullets: Single Dashboard to access orders, payments, documents, and service requests.
Track every step from purchase to delivery with complete visibility.
Personalized offers, alerts, and real-time notifications.

apiExtensibility.title: API EXTENSIBILITY
apiExtensibility.subtitle: Easily connect AutoConnect with the systems you already use.
bullets: Plug & Play: Works seamlessly with DMS, CRM, and payment gateways.
Enterprise-Ready: Compatible with SAP, Keyloop, Salesforce, and more.
Future-Proof: Secure, scalable APIs designed to grow with your business.

components.subheading: Core layers driving connected customer experiences and seamless transactions.

workflowAutomation.title: Workflow Automation
items: Approvals, notifications, and SLAs in one system
Cross-department sync across sales, delivery, and support
Triggers and escalations via a simple admin panel

lifecycle.subheading: AutoConnect connects every moment of the customer lifecycle - turning every interaction into growth.
lifecycle.screenshotAlt: Customer Lifecycle Journey - From Lead & Awareness through Vehicle Discovery, Purchase & Delivery, Service & Aftersales, Engagement, to Customer Retention & Loyalty

leadAwareness.title: Lead & Awareness
leadAwareness.description: Online inquiries, test drive bookings, campaigns tracking

purchaseDelivery.title: Purchase & Delivery
purchaseDelivery.description: Reserve/Buy, finance, e-sign, track delivery, online payment

serviceAftersales.title: Service & Aftersales
serviceAftersales.description: Service booking, approve quotes, service tracker, online payment

retentionLoyalty.title: Customer Retention & Loyalty
retentionLoyalty.description: VOC, real-time dashboards, segmentation, journey analytics

comparison.subheading: See how AutoConnect transforms both sales and aftersales experiences.

sales.title: Shaping Buyer Experience
sales.subtitle: Modern Car Buyers Want More than Bricks and Mortar. Delivering a seamless digital journey is your competitive edge.

customerExperience.digital: Seamless, self-service, transparent, guided by smart tools, convenient.

financingInsurance.digital: Instant offers; online applications; real-time decisions.

aftersales.title: Service Without Boundaries
aftersales.subtitle: Shift from reactive repairs to proactive care - anticipating customer needs before they arise.

customerExperience.digital: Self-service portal: track status, approve quotes, rate service.

bookingScheduling.traditional: Phone calls, limited hours, manual scheduling.

checkInTransparency.traditional: Unsure about costs until counter, long waits, limited visibility.
checkInTransparency.digital: Upfront service menus, digital quotations and approvals, live tracking.

approvalsCommunication.digital: Automated notifications via SMS & app, one-click quote approvals.

handoverHomeDelivery.traditional: Status via phone calls; on-site paperwork.
handoverHomeDelivery.digital: Ready-for-pickup alerts, e-receipts, optional home delivery.

postServiceFollowUp.digital: NPS survey, case management for issues.

engagementRetention.traditional: Customers drift to independents after warranty.
engagementRetention.digital: Integrated loyalty, rewards, and personalized offers.

stats.subheading: Launch a unified, consistent, multilingual customer journey leveraging the systems you already use.

onlinePreference.description: of potential car buyers under 45 prefer to purchase their vehicles online, indicating the growing importance of digital CX.

aftersalesSpend.description: of consumers reported they would increase annual spending on aftersales if the experience improved.

revenueGain.description: can be gained annually in additional revenue by Dealers who improve CX.

customersCTA.heading: Join Our Growing Community
customersCTA.subheading: Over 250 automotive businesses across the Middle East trust AutoConnect to deliver exceptional customer experiences. Ready to be next?
